product_overview: EchoGrow is a creative branding and advertising website that helps businesses explore services, review portfolio and campaign examples, understand the process, review pricing, and submit lead inquiries through contact forms.
core_goals: Explore creative branding and advertising services
Learn how the service process works
Contact EchoGrow and submit a business inquiry

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Users can move through the main website pages from the header and footer navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click navigation links in header -> View Services page -> Click navigation links in header -> View Portfolio page -> Click navigation links in header -> View How It Works page -> Click navigation links in header -> View Pricing page -> Click navigation links in header -> View About page -> Click navigation links in header -> View Contact page
Navigate to / -> Click footer links -> View linked site page

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Users can view the main landing page content, including the hero section, trust indicators, service highlights, and calls to action.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section -> View trust indicators -> View service highlights -> View footer
Navigate to / -> Click a call to action -> View the linked destination page

features.name: Services Overview
features.description: Users can browse the available branding and advertising services and related industry categories.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> View service cards -> View industry categories -> View creative service descriptions -> Click a call to action -> View the linked destination page
Navigate to /services -> Select a category filter -> View the filtered service list

features.name: Portfolio and Campaign Examples
features.description: Users can review campaign and case study examples and use category filters to narrow the displayed portfolio items.
user_flows: Navigate to /portfolio -> View campaign cards -> Select a category filter -> View the filtered portfolio items
Navigate to /portfolio -> Enter an email in the inquiry form -> Submit the form -> View success toast
Navigate to /portfolio -> Enter an invalid email in the inquiry form -> Submit the form -> See validation error

features.name: How It Works Overview
features.description: Users can understand the five-step process and interact with frequently asked questions.
user_flows: Navigate to /how-it-works -> View the 5-step process overview -> Expand a FAQ item -> Collapse the FAQ item
Navigate to /how-it-works -> Click a call to action -> View the linked contact destination

features.name: Pricing
features.description: Users can review pricing options, free features, and flexible pricing messaging.
user_flows: Navigate to /pricing -> View pricing cards -> View free features section -> Click a call to action -> View the linked destination page

features.name: About
features.description: Users can learn about the company mission, story, industries served, and process overview.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> View mission section -> View company story -> View industries served -> View process overview
Navigate to /about -> Click a call to action -> View the linked destination page

features.name: Lead Generation Form
features.description: Users can submit a business inquiry by providing contact and project details through the contact form.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in business name -> Fill in business type -> Select required services -> Fill in goals -> Submit the form -> View success toast
Navigate to /contact -> Leave a required field blank -> Submit the form -> See validation error
Navigate to /contact -> Fill in an invalid email -> Submit the form -> See validation error

features.name: Lead Generation Form
features.description: Contact form for submitting business inquiries
